CREATE TABLE session_keys (key_id INT PRIMARY KEY, session_key VARBINARY(24));
INSERT INTO session_keys (key_id, session_key) VALUES (1, xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('ses_key'));
INSERT INTO session_keys (key_id, session_key) SELECT key_id, xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('session_' || key_id) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT key_id FROM session_keys) AS temp WHERE key_id < 5;
SELECT key_id, session_key FROM session_keys WHERE session_key = xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('test_key');
SELECT key_id, session_key FROM session_keys WHERE key_id IN (SELECT key_id FROM session_keys WHERE session_key IS NOT NULL) AND session_key = xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('nested_key');
WITH temp_keys AS (SELECT key_id, xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('param_' || key_id) AS temp_key FROM session_keys) SELECT * FROM temp_keys WHERE temp_key IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE user_sessions (user_id INT, session_key VARBINARY(24), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id));
INSERT INTO user_sessions (user_id, session_key) SELECT user_id, xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('user_session_' || user_id) FROM users;
SELECT us.user_id, us.session_key FROM user_sessions us JOIN session_keys sk ON us.session_key = sk.session_key WHERE us.user_id < 10;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM session_keys WHERE session_key LIKE xenc_key_3DES_rand_create('random_%');
